title: pelargonium × darnleyanum
intro: Pelargonium × darnleyanum, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Pelargonium genus, typically found in South Africa. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. Herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
